name: morning-risk-check
description: Portfolio risk assessment and position validation
task: Execute portfolio risk analysis. Read trader-config.json for risk limits. Check: (1) Current position heat vs max_position_pct; (2) Daily P&L vs daily_loss_limit; (3) Correlation between open positions; (4) Concentration risk; (5) Available buying power. Validate that any new trades would stay within 1-2% risk per trade rule. Write risk summary to trading/RISK-ASSESSMENT.json. If limits approached, flag in WATCHLIST.md with ⚠️ RISK LIMIT warning. Never allow recommendations that breach configured limits.
